zh.lifeSummary: 當Johan Heigham於1469年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Thomas Heigham27歲，母親Alice Cotton23歲。她於1479年與Thomas Robert Buck在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可文哈斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johan Heigham于1469年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲Thomas Heigham27岁，母亲Alice Cotton23岁。她于1479年与Thomas Robert Buck在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在她的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可文哈斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Heigham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Higham (Lancashire, Yorkshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire, Bedfordshire, Warwickshire, Essex, and Kent) or from Heigham in Norfolk. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + hām ‘village, homestead’, though the Norfolk placename may come from Old English hecg ‘hedge’ or hecc ‘hatch, gate’ + hām.

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jöns
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Johan Heigham was born in 1469, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Heigham, was 27 and her mother, Alice Cotton, was 23. She married Thomas Robert Buck in 1479, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1520, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Wenhaston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johan Heigham est née en 1469, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Heigham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Cotton, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Robert Buck en 1479, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1520, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Wenhaston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johan Heigham 1469 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Heigham 27 und ihre Mutter Alice Cotton 23. Sie hat 1479 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Robert Buck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wenhaston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Heigham è nata il nel 1469 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Heigham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Alice Cotton, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Robert Buck nel 1479, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Wenhaston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan Heighamが1469年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Heighamは27歳，母Alice Cottonは23歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでThomas Robert Buckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウエンハストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johan Heigham(이)가 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Heigham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Cotton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Thomas Robert Buck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웬하스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Heigham nasceu em 1469, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Heigham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Cotton, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Robert Buck em 1479, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1520, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Wenhaston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johan Heigham родилась в 1469 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Heigham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Cotton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Robert Buck в 1479 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1520 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности венастон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Robert Buck en 1479, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1520, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Wenhaston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
